description: Check the health of an OpenProject instance via its built-in health check endpoint (/health_checks).

check_type.description: Health check type. Use 'default' for the standard check, or one of: database, mail, puma, worker, worker_backed_up, all.

base_url.description: Base URL of the OpenProject instance.

insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. NOT RECOMMENDED for production use.

auth_password.description: Basic auth password for the health check endpoint. Required if OpenProject is configured with health_checks_authentication_password.
